2.title: Total sessions
2.query:
timeseries all = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.sessions.all),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance }
| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(all) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Active Sessions
3.query:
timeseries active = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.sessions.active),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance }
| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(active) desc
| limit 20

4.title: User calls
4.query:
timeseries count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.sessions.userCalls.count),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance }
| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Connection management time
5.query:
timeseries count = avg(com.dynatrace.extension.sql-oracle.queries.connectionManagement.count),
  by: { dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance }
| fieldsAdd sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.sql:com_dynatrace_extension_sql-oracle_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20
